The order in which AVD number is specified:
IC - AVD number is specified for IC;
GPIC - AVD number is specified for nested ICs or
for GPIC, or for both nested ICs and GPIC (and in
this case the AVD number of GPIC and nested ICs
shall coincide). AVD number which is specified
only for the GPIC, is transferred by default to all
nested ICs;
SPIC, ACC - AVD number is specified for nested
ICs only.
AVD number specified for nested ICs is not
transferred by default to the aggregate.
The TT GIS operates in a special mode when FGIS
VetIS is unavailable, namely, without checking
AVD identifier. Therefore, during FGIS VetIS
unavailability, the parameter can be filled in with
both real AVD identifier and zeros (value of
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 or
0000-0000-0000-0000-0000-0000-0000-0000), but
only if at the time of submission of the document
there is no technical possibility to issue an
electronic AVD in the FGIS VetIS.
When FGIS VetIS becomes available, an automatic
repeated processing of the document is started in
the TT GIS with a check of AVD identifier.
Identifiers consisting of zeros are not checked. A
check result can be found in the IC card in the
“Document operation type” field. If the check fails
or the document contains an identifier consisting
only of zeros, it is necessary to submit “Correction
of information on codes” document
(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE) with the
correct AVD identifier to the TT GIS. If AVD
identifier is not corrected, information about the
violation will be transmitted to authorized

string

EEU

code of
the goods
This parameter is mandatory if IC of the unit of
goods is specified. If SIC or SPIC is specified, the
parameter shall not be filled in, but it shall be filled
in for all nested items. If GPIC is specified, the
parameter shall be filled in both for GPIC and all
nested ICs. Format: 10 digits.

new EEU FEACN codes (valid from January 01,

additives", “Light industry”, "Dairy products", and
"Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights
and flash bulbs” goods groups

receive a real cost of the IC, SPIC shall
contain identical items).
A price is indicated in kopecks with VAT (if the

(“VAT amount”), length of numerical value is from

4.1.4.6. Introduction into circulation. Remaining items
A document can be created for the following goods groups: “Games and toys for children”,
“Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal hygiene products”, “Light industry”, “Medical
devices”, “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”,
“Specialized food products and biologically active food additives”.
Important
Submission of the document is available for the “Games and toys for children” goods group only for
the goods listed in the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation dated May 31, 2025 No.
819 “On Approval of the Rules for Labeling the Individual Types of Goods for Children Using
Identification Means and Specific Aspects of Implementing the State Information System for
Monitoring the Circulation of Goods Subject to Mandatory Labeling Using Identification Means of
Individual Types of Goods for Children”.
Submission of the document is available for the “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal
hygiene products” goods group only for the goods listed in the Decree of the Government of the
Russian Federation dated May 31, 2025 No. 808 “On Conducting an Experiment on the Territory of
the Russian Federation on Marking of Individual Types of Personal Hygiene Products Packed in
Consumer Packaging Using Identification Means, and on Amending Decree of the Government of
the Russian Federation dated November 30, 2024 No. 1681”.
Submission of the document is available for the “Medical devices” goods group only for the goods
listed in the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation dated November 21, 2025 No. 1855
“On amending the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation dated May 31, 2024 No. 744”.
Submission of the document is available for the “Light industry” goods group only for the goods that
are specified in the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation dated December 25, 2025
No. 2129 “On amending the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation dated December
31, 2019 No.1956”. There will be no return of funds for the MCs ordered for the goods that are
subject to marking since January 1, 2021 with the “Remains marking” emission type
For the “Radio-electronic products” and “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”
goods groups, submission of the document is available for goods listed in the Decree of the


---

## Page 115


115
Government of the Russian Federation No.1954 dated November 28, 2025, “On Approval of the
Rules for Labeling the Individual Types of Radio-electronic Products Using Identification Means, on
Specific Aspects of Implementing the State Information System for Monitoring the Circulation of
Goods Subject to Mandatory Labeling Using Identification Means concerning Individual Types of
Radio-electronic Products”.
Submission of the document is available for the “Specialized food products and biologically active
food additives” goods group only for the goods listed in the Decree of the Government of the
Russian Federation dated May 31, 2025 No.811 “On Approval of the Rules for Labeling Food
Products for Athletes Using Identification Means, on Specific Aspects of Implementing the State
Information System for Monitoring the Circulation of Goods Subject to Mandatory Labeling with
Identification Means concerning Food Products for Athletes, and on Conducting an Experiment on
the Territory of the Russian Federation on Marking of Food Products for Athletes with Identification
Means”.
Type of document:

Description
LP_INTRODUCE_OST

of
object
s
-
Array
containing
the data of
the
documents
confirming
compliance
Details may be specified either in the
“certificate_document_data”
array
(using
“certificate_type”,
“certificate_number”,
“certificate_date” parameters) or outside the
array, if no permitting document details are
specified for the codes in the marking system.
If
the
“certificate_type”
parameter
is
specified,
“certificate_number”
and
“certificate_date” will be mandatory at the
same level at which “certificate_type” is
specified.
Providing information about a document
confirming compliance both inside and
outside the “certificate_document_data”
array is prohibited.

For the “Games and toys for children” goods
group, the following sequential validation of
permitting document presence and status is
performed:
•
First, the permitting document is val-
idated within the submitted docu-
ment;
•
If no details are found in the
document,
existing
permitting
document details registered in the
Marking System for the code are val-
idated;
•
If no permitting document details are
found in either the document or the
marking system, details will be vali-
dated in the goods card in the
NCMG. If the “YES” value is
specified in the “Requirements of the
confirmation of conformity are
missing;  grounds” parameter in the
goods card, no validations are per-
formed.

If the permitting document is missing or
invalid for at least one IC (including those
nested into the aggregate), the introduction
into circulation will fail. To avoid errors, we

4.1.4.7. Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing
The document can be created for the following goods groups: ‘Auto parts and components for
vehicles’, ‘Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers’, ‘Groceries’, ‘Non-alcoholic
beer’, ‘Specialized food products and biologically active food additives’, ‘Bicycles and bicycle
frames’, ‘Veterinary medicines’, ‘Perfume and Eau de Toilette’, ‘Games and toys for children’,
‘Cabling and wiring products’, ‘Canned foods’, ‘Pet foods’, ‘Cosmetics, household chemicals, and
personal hygiene products’, ‘Light industry’, ‘Medical devices’, ‘Dairy products’, ‘Seafood’,
‘Engine oils’, ‘Meat products’, ‘Real fur’, ‘Footwear’, ‘Heaters’, ‘Printed goods’, ‘Pyrotechnics
and fire-fighting equipment’, ‘Polymer pipes’, ‘Semi-finished and frozen food products’, ‘Radio-
electronic products’, ‘Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones’, ‘Radio-electronic
products. Electronic nicotine delivery systems’, ‘Vegetable oils’, ‘Confectionery products’, ‘Juice
products and non-alcoholic beverages’, ‘Building materials’, ‘Titanium metal products’, ‘Home
and kitchen goods’, ‘Products made of real fur’, ‘Fertilizers in consumer packaging’, ‘Packaged
water’, ‘Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs’, and ‘New pneumatic
rubber tires and tire casings’.
Submission of the document is available for the “Auto parts and components for vehicles”,
“Groceries”, “Veterinary medicines”, “Games and toys for children”, “Cabling and wiring
products”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal hygiene
products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Meat products”, “Real fur”, “Heaters”, “Printed goods”,
“Pyrotechnics and fire-fighting equipment”, “Polymer pipes”, “Semi-finished and frozen food
products”, “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”,
“Radio-electronic products. Electronic nicotine delivery systems”, “Vegetable oils”,
“Confectionery products”, “Building materials”, “Titanium metal products”, “Home and kitchen
goods”, “Fertilizers in consumer packaging” goods groups only in * .json format.
To avoid errors, before submitting the document it is necessary to ensure that:
•
a product manufacturer, INN of which is specified in the “producer_inn” parameter (“INN
of product manufacturer”), has a valid production license in the Rosselkhoznadzor regis-
try — for the “Veterinary medicines” goods group;
•
the permitting document previously specified in the marking system is valid — for the
“Specialized food products and biologically active food additives” goods group;


---

## Page 121


121
•
the total weight/volume of the products specified in the document (including the products
nested into the aggregate) does not exceed the weight/volume specified in the AVD by
more than:
– 2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group;
– 5 % — for the “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Dairy products” goods groups.

Type of document:
Type
Description
LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING
Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing. JSON
(MANUAL)
LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML
Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing. XML

        },
        {

        },

goods
production
The parameter is optional for the “Light
industry”, “Building materials” (only with
FEACN code 2523, except for 2523 10 000
0), “Products made of real fur” and “New
pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings”
goods groups. The parameter is mandatory
for other goods groups if a production date
has not been specified in an application
report for the units of goods.
If the parameter is filled in for the IC that
has previously indicated production date, it
will be changed to a date that is specified in
this parameter.
Availability of the production date for the
nested items is checked for GPIC / SIC. If
at least one nested item does not have these
data, a date shall be specified in the
parameter. The production date will not be
assigned to GPIC / SIC, but it will be
overwritten for all the nested items that are
part of the aggregate.

*uit
string
+
IC / ICM
Requirements for a code:
•
IC status — “APPLIED” (“Ap-
plied”);

•
emission type — “LOCAL”
(“Manufacture in the Russian Fed-
eration”);

•
package type — “UNIT” (“Unit of
goods”), “GROUP” (“Group pack-
age”), “SET” (“Set”) or “BUN-
DLE” (“Bundle”);

•
there is no extended status.
For the “Dairy products” goods group, it is
allowed to specify ICs / SICs / GPICs with
"RETIRED" status ("Withdrawn") if they
have been applied, but have not been
previously introduced into circulation.


---

## Page 124


124
For all goods groups, except “Products
made of real fur” goods group: if
aggregation takes place before introduction
into circulation, ICs of the aggregates must
be specified. GPIC and SIC are not
introduced into circulation without
specifying the nested ICs.
*uitu
string
-
SPIC
The parameter is not used for the “Products
made of real fur” goods group. For other
goods groups: this parameter is mandatory
if a value of "uit" ("IC / ICM") parameter is
not specified. Requirements to SPIC:
•
SPIC status is not equal to
“DISAGGREGATION” (“Disaggregated”);
•
an emission type of the SPIC
nested items — “LOCAL” (“Manufacture
in the Russian Federation”), there is no
extended status;
•
package type — “BOX” (“SPIC”)
*vsd_number
string
-
AVD
identifier
Number of production AVD.
The parameter is mandatory if goods are
subject to veterinary checks
(“veterinaryControl” (“Subject to
veterinary checks (supervision)”) = “true”
in a card in the NCMG). The parameter
shall be missing for the non-controlled
goods.
Format:
[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-
9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12};
[A-F0-9]{8}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-
F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{12};
[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-
9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-
[a-f0-9]{4};
[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-
F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-
9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}.
The order in which AVD number is
specified:
IC - AVD number is specified for IC;
GPIC - AVD number is specified for nested
ICs or for GPIC, or for both nested ICs and
GPIC (and in this case the AVD number of
GPIC and nested ICs shall coincide). AVD
number specified only for GPIC is
transferred by default to all nested ICs;


---

## Page 125


125
SPIC, ACC - AVD number is specified
only for nested ICs.
AVD number specified for nested ICs is not
transferred by default to aggregate
The TT GIS operates in a special mode
when FGIS VetIS is unavailable, namely,
without checking AVD identifier.
Therefore, during FGIS VetIS
unavailability, the parameter can be filled
in with both real AVD identifier and zeros
(value of 00000000-0000-0000-0000-
000000000000 or 0000-0000-0000-0000-
0000-0000-0000-0000), but only if at the
time of submission of the document there is
no technical possibility to issue an
electronic AVD in the FGIS VetIS.
When FGIS VetIS becomes available, an
automatic repeated processing of the
document is started in the TT GIS with a
check
of
AVD
identifier.
Identifiers
consisting of zeros are not checked. A check
result can be found in the IC card in the
“Document operation type” field. If the
check fails or the document contains an
identifier consisting only of zeros, it is
necessary
to
submit
“Correction
of
information
on
codes”
document
(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE)
with
the correct AVD identifier to the TT GIS. If
AVD identifier is not corrected, information
about the violation will be transmitted to
authorized
government
authorities
for
control (surveillance) measures.
Data on failed verification of the AVD
identifier in the ICs being part of the GPIC /
SIC will be recorded for the GPIC / SIC until
all AVD identifiers of the nested ICs are
successfully verified

hand

“Light
industry”,
"Specialized food products and biologically
active food additives", "Dairy products", and
"Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash
lights and flash bulbs” goods groups

number
It is specified only for the “Packaged water”

The
parameter
is
mandatory
if
the

catalog.

inclusive. One or several water well
numbers (separated by comma and space)
shall be specified in the following format:
"44444444,
55555555,
88888888".
"well_number” parameter ("Water well
number")
can
be
specified
without

("Type of the permitting document"),

of
the

The “licences” array with “licence_number”
(“Number
of

and


---

## Page 130


130
“licence_date”

issue

parameters

if

“groundwaterUtilization” (“Is not obtained

(including for codes nested into the

If information on the license is specified for
an aggregate, but it is not specified for the
nested items of the aggregate, the data will
be automatically saved in the TT GIS for
nested items of the aggregate. If information
is specified for the nested items, but it is not
specified for the aggregate, information
specified will not be saved for the aggregate.
If information is specified both for aggregate
and its nested items, information specified
will be saved both for the aggregate and its
nested items.
If an aggregate contains nested items for
which it is mandatory to fill in license
details, it is recommended to transfer in the
document both the aggregate and its nested
items. If an aggregate contains only nested
items for which it is optional to fill in license
details, it is allowed to transfer an aggregate
only

string
-
Number of
subsoil
license

“licence_date” (“License issue date”) is
specified. For products that are obtained
from
underground
sources
(the
“groundwaterUtilization” (“Is not obtained
from underground sources”) is unfilled in a

correspond
to
the
structure:
“SeriesNumberType”, shall contain from 10
to 14 characters, inclusive: digits and
Cyrillic characters (0-9 А-Я а-я) without
spaces and special characters. Example:
МОС06318ВЭ

**licence_date
string
date
-

issue date

“licence_number” (“Number of subsoil
license”) is specified. Time can be specified
in a value, but it will be ignored during
processing. A range of allowed values: from
the document creation date (current date)
minus 15 years to document creation date.

array
of

-

containing

A recursive element which contains the
same parameters as “products_list” (“Array

does. It is filled in only for the SIC, GPIC,

Example of the document body in * .xml format:

4.1.4.8 Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS
The document can be created for the following GGs: ‘Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and
hand sanitizers’, ‘Groceries’, ‘Non-alcoholic beer’, ‘Specialized food products and biologically
active food additives’, ‘Bicycles and bicycle frames’, ‘Veterinary medicines’, ‘Perfume and Eau
de Toilette’, ‘Games and toys for children’, ‘Canned foods’, ‘Pet foods’, ‘Cosmetics, household
chemicals, and personal hygiene products’, ‘Light industry’, ‘Medical devices’, ‘Dairy products’,
‘Seafood’, ‘Engine oils’, ‘Real fur’, ‘Footwear’, ‘Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages’,
‘Radio-electronic products’, ‘Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones’, ‘Vegetable
oils’, ‘Confectionery products’, ‘Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages’, ‘Building
materials’, ‘Packaged water’, ‘Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights, and flash bulbs’,
and ‘New Pneumatic Rubber Tires and Tire Casings’.
The document can be submitted only in * .json format for the "Antiseptic/antibacterial skin
cleansers and hand sanitizers", “Groceries”, “Non-alcoholic beer”, "Specialized food products and
biologically active food additives", “Bicycles and bicycle frames”, “Veterinary medicines”,
“Games and toys for children”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals,
and personal hygiene products”, “Medical devices”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Real fur”,  “Radio-
electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”, “Vegetable oils”,
“Confectionery products”, “Building materials”, “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages”
goods groups.
For the “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages” goods group:
After successful processing of the application report, the ICs with “Imported into the Russian
Federation” emission type (“FOREIGN”) change their status from “Emitted” (“EMITTED”) to
“Applied” (“APPLIED”), and then they can be indicated in the “Introduction into circulation.
Import with FCS” document (LP_FTS_INTRODUCE).
Note
When the TT GIS receives the notification “Distribution of universal information from ‘Unified
Automated Information System of the Customs Authorities’ on released goods” from the FCS, the
identification codes for which a positive decision has been issued will be automatically introduced into


---

## Page 133


133
circulation using the “4.2.2.3. Auto-introduction into circulation when importing with FCS” document
(LP_FTS_INTRODUCE_AUTO)
Before the start of mandatory marking of goods with a packing characteristic other than “Keg”, it
is recommended not to specify their ICs in the document on the production environment. When
specifying such ICs, the document will be processed successfully, but ICs will not be introduced
into circulation and will remain in “Awaiting confirmation from FCS” extended status until the
resubmission of the document and receipt of the appropriate response from FCS, because before
the start of the mandatory marking of the goods with a packing characteristic other than “Keg”,
FCS will not provide information about such goods to the TT GIS. It is allowed to indicate ACC.
INN and KPP of the document sender are checked during the document processing for the absence
of blocking in EGAIS.
For the “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers”, “Groceries”, “Non-
alcoholic beer”, “Bicycles and bicycle frames”, “Perfume and Eau de Toilette”, “Games and
toys for children”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and
personal hygiene products”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Real fur”,
“Footwear”,
“Beer,
beer-based
and
low-alcohol
beverages”,
“Vegetable
oils”,
“Confectionery products”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”, “Specialized food
products and biologically active food additives”, “Building materials”, “Packaged water”,
“Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs”, and “New pneumatic
rubber tires and tire casings” goods groups, the following checks are performed for permitting
documents specified in the customs declaration for codes of the units of goods (including those
nested into the aggregate):
•
presence of permitting document details is verified;
•
permitting document details are validated against the data specified in goods cards in the
NCMG;
•
permitting documents are confirmed to be valid.

If the customs declaration does not contain permitting document details, checks are
performed based on existing data previously specified in the marking system for ICs of units of
goods, including those nested into the aggregate. If no permitting document is specified in a goods
card in the NCMG and “reasonCertMissingDetails” (“Requirements of confirmation of conformity
are missing; grounds”) = “true”, no permitting document checks are performed.
If a different permitting document was previously indicated in the marking system for the code, it
will be replaced with details from the customs declaration.
To avoid errors, before submitting the document it is necessary to ensure that:
•
there is a valid production license in the Rosselkhoznadzor registry — for the “Veterinary
medicines” goods group;
•
the total weight/volume of the products specified in the document (including the products
nested into the aggregate) does not exceed the weight/volume specified in the AVD by
more than:


---

## Page 134


134
– 2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group;
– 5 % — for the “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Dairy products” goods groups.

Type of document:
Type
Description
LP_FTS_INTRODUCE
Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS. JSON (MANUAL)
LP_FTS_INTRODUCE_XML
Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS. XML

---

## Page 138


138
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
*cis / *ki / *kitu /
*atk
string
+
Code
A code must be specified in one of the
parameters depending on a package type:
•
“cis” — for any package type;
•
“ki” — for any package type, except
the "BOX" (shipping package (SPIC)) and
"ACC" (aggregated customs code (ACC));
•
“kitu” — for the “GROUP” (group
package (GPIC)) and “BOX” (shipping
package (SPIC)) package types;
•
“atk” — for the “ACC” package type
(aggregated customs code (ACC)).
When IC being part of the aggregate is
indicated, the aggregate will be automatically
disaggregated.
The code specified should have no an extended
status or has “FTS_RESPOND_NOT_OK”
(“Negative decision from FCS”) /
“FTS_CONTROL” (“Under control of FCS”)
extended status.
In case of simultaneous indication of the
aggregate and its nested items outside of the
“children” parameter (“Array containing the list
of nested ICs”), the document will be processed
with error.
If an IC of the aggregate is specified in the
document, introduction into circulation will be
carried out successfully when the specified IC
of the aggregate (ACC, SPIC) is found in the
CD with a positive FCS decision.
When submitting information on import:
•
of a group package / bundle — only
GPIC / PIC is specified in the CD and
in the document;
•
of the set — only SIC is specified in
the CD if its nested items have the
same FEACN codes, and ICs being
part of the set and grouped in the lines
of the customs declaration in
accordance with the FEACN code, are
specified— if nested items of the set
have different FEACN codes. In any
case, only SIC is specified in the
document.
*color
string
-
Color
It is filled in if a goods group is “Light
industry” or “Footwear”. A length of the value


---

## Page 139


139
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
is from 1 to 1024 letter characters in English or
Russian
*productSize
string
-
Size
It is filled in if a goods group is “Light
industry” or “Footwear”. A length of the value
is from 1 to 1024 letter characters in English or
Russian (e.g. for footwear: 37RUS/6US)
*vsd_number
string
-
AVD
identifier
Number of the first transport AVD. The
parameter is mandatory if goods are subject to
veterinary checks (“veterinaryControl”
(“Subject to veterinary checks (supervision)”) =
“true” in a card in the NCMG). The parameter
shall be unfilled for the non-controlled goods.
Format:
[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-
9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12};
[A-F0-9]{8}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-
9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{12};
[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-
9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-
f0-9]{4};
[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-
9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-
[A-F0-9]{4}.
The order in which AVD number is specified:
IC — AVD number is specified for IC;
GPIC — AVD number is specified for nested
ICs and / or for GPIC (AVD number of the GPIC
and nested ICs shall coincide). AVD number
which is specified only for the GPIC, is
transferred by default to all nested ICs;
SIC, SPIC, ACC - AVD number is specified
only for nested ICs.
AVD number specified for nested ICs is not
transferred by default to aggregate
The TT GIS operates in a special mode when
FGIS VetIS is unavailable, namely, without
checking AVD identifier. Therefore, during
FGIS VetIS unavailability, the parameter can
be filled in with both real AVD identifier and
zeros (value of 00000000-0000-0000-0000-
000000000000 or 0000-0000-0000-0000-0000-
0000-0000-0000), but only if at the time of
submission of the document there is no
technical possibility to issue an electronic AVD
in the FGIS VetIS.
When FGIS VetIS becomes available, an
automatic repeated processing of the document


---

## Page 140


140
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
is started in the TT GIS with a check of AVD
identifier. Identifiers consisting of zeros are not
checked. A check result can be found in the IC
card in the “Document operation type” field. If
the check fails or the document contains an
identifier consisting only of zeros, it is necessary
to submit “Correction of information on codes”
document (CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE)
with the correct AVD identifier to the TT GIS.
If AVD identifier is not corrected, information
about the violation will be transmitted to
authorized government authorities for control
(surveillance) measures
Data on failed verification of the AVD identifier
in the ICs being part of the GPIC / SIC will be
recorded for the GPIC / SIC until all AVD
identifiers of the nested ICs are successfully
verified
*production_date
string
date
-
Date of
goods
production
The parameter is mandatory for the “Dairy
products” goods group if a production date has
not been specified during submission of the
application report and outside of the
“products_list” array (“Array containing the list
of codes for introduction into circulation”). If
the parameter is filled in for the IC that has
previously indicated production date, it will be
changed to a date that is specified in this
parameter.
Availability of the production date for the
nested items is checked for GPIC / SIC. If at
least one nested item does not have these data,
a date shall be specified in the parameter. The
production date will not be assigned to GPIC /
SIC, but it will be overwritten for all the nested
items that are part of the aggregate.
For other goods groups the parameter is
optional.
Range of allowed values: from the document
creation date minus five years to document
creation date. Time can be specified, but it will
be ignored during processing.
Format:
dd.MM.yyyy;
yyyy-MM-dd;
yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ;
yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ;
dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm


---

## Page 141


141
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
*children
array of
objects
-
Array
containing a
list of nested
ICs
A recursive element which contains the same
parameters
as
“products_list”
(“Array
containing the list of transferred ICs”) array
does. It is filled in only for the SIC, GPIC, SPIC,
ACC. The parameter is mandatory for the nested
items that are subject to veterinary control.  For
the non-controlled nested items, the parameter is
optional.
Only nested items of the aggregate shall be in a
list of nested items of the aggregate, at the same
time, there is no need to indicate all nested items
of the aggregate
After processing the document, release decision received from FCS will be added to each IC.
Possible
values:

•
FTS_RESPONSE_OK - positive decision, goods are introduced into circulation;
•
FTS_RESPONSE_NOT_OK - negative decision, goods are not introduced into circulation.

4.1.4.10. Introduction into circulation. With reason
The document can be created for the “Real fur” and “Radio-electronic products” goods groups.
Note
Submission of the document is temporarily unavailable
for the “Real fur” goods group. Additional information
regarding the possibility of creating this document will
be announced later

4.1.5. Return into circulation
Creation of the document is available for the following goods groups: “Alternative tobacco
products”, “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers”, “Groceries”, “Non-
alcoholic beer”, “Specialized food products and biologically active food additives”, “Bicycles and
bicycle frames”, “Veterinary medicines”, “Perfume and Eau de Toilette”, “Canned foods”, “Pet
foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal hygiene products”, “Light industry”,
“Medical devices”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Nicotine products”,  “Footwear”,
“Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages”, “Vegetable oils”, “Juice products and non-
alcoholic beverages”, “Building materials”, “Tobacco products”, “Products made of real fur”,
“Packaged water”, “Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs”, “New
pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings”.
At the same time, submission of the document for the “Alternative tobacco products”, “Groceries”,
“Non-alcoholic beer”, “Specialized food products and biologically active food additives”,
“Bicycles and bicycle frames”, “Veterinary medicines”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics,
household chemicals, and personal hygiene products”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Engine
oils”, “Nicotine products”, “Vegetable oils”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”,
“Building materials”, “Tobacco products”, “Packaged water” goods groups is available only in *
.json format.
Specific features of the multi-product sets:
•
the goods groups of all codes specified directly in the document must be the same. The
goods groups of their nested items may differ;
•
the permitting documents are verified for each code, including nested items;
•
the return reason must be available for all goods groups of the codes specified.
Type of document:
Type
Description
LP_RETURN
Return into circulation. JSON (MANUAL)
LP_RETURN_XML
Return into circulation. XML

4.1.6.2. Shipment to EEU
Process of submitting information on shipment of codes (emitted in the Russian Federation) to
EEU member states with recognition in the National marking and track and trace information
system of EEU member states has been ensured in the TT GIS. Submission of information on
shipment to EEU with code recognition has been implemented for the following goods groups:
“Groceries”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Light industry”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”,
“Engine oils”, “Footwear”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”, “Vegetable
oils”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”, “Packaged water” and “New pneumatic
rubber tires and tire casings”.
At the same time, submission of the document is available for the “Groceries”, “Canned foods”,
“Pet foods”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and
smartphones”, “Vegetable oils”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages” goods groups only
in * .json format.
Document type:
Type
Description
EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT
Shipment to EEU. JSON (MANUAL)
EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_CSV
Shipment to EEU. CSV
Example of document body in * .json format:
{
   "sender_inn":"0000000000",
   "receiver_inn":"111111111",
   "receiver":"X",
   "receiver_gln": "0000000000002",
   "receiver_country_code":112,
   "document_num":"UECB00000000000000000000-0000",
   "document_date":"2021-12-13",
   "transfer_date":"2021-12-13",
   "products":[
      {
         "cis":"0000000000000000000n)YspnXyJ9tU",
         "product_cost":100,
         "product_tax":50,
         "import_data":{
            "importer_id":"1234567890",
            "importer_name":"ООО Импортер",
            "declaration_number":"88888888/131221/7777777",
            "declaration_date":"2021-12-13"
         },
         "certificate_document_data":[
            {
               "certificate_type":"CONFORMITY_CERTIFICATE",
               "certificate_number":"RU С-ХХ.АА00.B.00001/21",
               "certificate_date":"2021-11-30"
            },

Parameter
Type

•

–

(“SPIC”),

(“GPIC”) —

•

nested into the aggregate), the status
must be “INTRODUCED” (“In
circulation”);
•
The
status
must
not
be
“DISAGGREGATION”
(“Disaggregated”) — for SPIC;
•
The extended status must not be
filled in;
•
The goods code must not belong to
the range 0290 — 0299;
•
When exporting to the Republic of
Armenia, ICs can be nested into the
GPIC / SPIC only for the “Vegetable
oils” goods group;
•
GPIC and SPIC:
–
must contain nested items
at all levels: if a SPIC
contains a GPIC or another
SPIC, those nested pack-
ages must also contain
nested items;
–
nested items must not be
duplicated in the document;
–
maximum
number
of
nested codes at one package
level is 10,000.
•
SPIC: can contain no more than 5
levels of nested items.

declaration
registration
number
The parameter is mandatory if the
“import_data” parameter is filled in;
otherwise, it must remain unfilled.
Three groups separated by symbol “/”, where
the first group can contain 2, 5 or 8 symbols,
the second - 6 (customs declaration date), the
third -7. Example:
88888888/010422/7777777. The second
group of digits in the registration number
must match a value of declaration
registration date specified in
"declaration_date" field and must correspond
to the format of ddMMyy

string

declaration
date
The parameter is mandatory if the
“import_data” parameter is filled in;
otherwise, it must remain unfilled. It
corresponds to the value of
“declaration_number” parameter (“Customs
declaration registration number”).
Date range: from January 1, 2000 to the
document creation date.
Format:

4.1.6.3. Shipment to EEU (volume and grade accounting)

The document can be created for the “Dairy products” goods group. The document is submitted
by the exporter of the Russian Federation before the actual movement of the marked goods to the
territory of the Republic of Belarus. Under the document, volume and grade indicators are
transferred (goods codes, quantity of goods, quantity of group packings (if required)).
Document type:
Type
Description
EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT
Shipment to EEU (volume and grade accounting). JSON
(MANUAL)
EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT_CSV
Shipment to EEU (volume and grade accounting). CSV

*cost
decima
l
-
Unit price
A price is indicated in kopecks with VAT (if
the transaction is subject to VAT). A value
cannot be negative, it shall be strictly greater
than “tax” (“VAT amount”), a length of
numerical value is from 0 to 17 digits,
inclusive. Range of values: from 0 to
99999999999999999 inclusive.
The parameter may be missing, without
value, or with value
*tax
decima
l
-
VAT
amount
VAT amount is indicated in kopecks. A value
cannot be negative, it shall be strictly less
than “cost” (“Unit price”), length of
numerical value is from 0 to 17 digits,
inclusive. If transaction is not subject to
VAT, “0” value shall be specified.
The parameter may be missing, without
value, or with value
*certificate_document_dat
a
array
of
objects
-
Array
containing
the data of
the
documents
confirming
complianc
e
Data can be specified either in
“certificate_document_data” (“Array
containing the data of the documents
confirming compliance”) array in
“certificate_type” (“Type of document
confirming compliance”),
“certificate_number” (“Number of document
confirming compliance”), “certificate_date”
(“Date of document confirming compliance”)
parameters, or in “products” (“List of
transferred goods”) array in
“certificate_type” (“Type of document
confirming compliance”),
“certificate_number” (“Number of document
confirming compliance”), “certificate_date”
(“Date of document confirming compliance”)
parameters. Simultaneous filling in and out of
the array “certificate_document_data”
(“Array containing the data of the documents
confirming compliance”) is not allowed. All
three parameters of the array shall be filled
simultaneously or all three shall be empty

4.1.6.4. Canceling Shipment
The document can be created for the following goods groups: “Bicycles and bicycle frames”,
“Perfume and Eau de Toilette”, “Light industry”, “Footwear”, “Products made of real fur”,
“Packaged water”, “Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs”, “New
pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings”.
Document type:
Type
Description
LP_CANCEL_SHIPMENT
Canceling shipment. JSON (MANUAL)

Parameters of the document in * .json format:
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
release_order_number
string
+
Number of
shipping
document

document_number
string
+
Number of
primary
document

document_date
string
(date-
time)
+
Date of
primary
document
Format: yyyy-MM-
ddTHH:mm:ss.SSS’ZTHH:mm:ss.SSS’Z.
Range: current date minus 5 calendar years ⇐
date ⇐ current date
accept_all
boolean
-
Accept all
If a value is true, there is no need to fill in the
“product” (“Array containing the list of
transferred ICs / ICMs”) parameter: all codes
listed in the shipping document will be
accepted.
If "reject_all" ("Reject all") and "accept_all"
("Accept all") = false, "accepted” (“Goods
acceptance attribute”) parameter will be
analyzed for each identification code in the
“Acceptance” document.
This parameter can not be filled in together with
"reject_all" ("Reject all") parameter
reject_all
boolean
-
Reject all
If a value is true, there is no need to fill in the
“products” (“Array containing the list of
transferred ICs / ICMs”) parameter: all codes
listed in the shipping document will be rejected.
If "reject_all" ("Reject all") and "accept_all"
("Accept all") = false, "accepted” (“Goods
acceptance attribute”) parameter will be
analyzed for each identification code / ICM in
the “Acceptance” document.
This parameter cannot be filled in together with
"accept_all" ("Accept all") parameter

## Page 173


173
Parameter
Type
Mandatory
Description
Comment
*product_cost
decimal
-
Unit price
A price is indicated in kopecks with VAT (if the
transaction is subject to VAT). A value cannot
be negative, it shall be strictly greater than
“product_tax” (“VAT amount”), length of
numerical value is from 0 to 17 digits, inclusive.
Range of values: from 0 to 99999999999999999
inclusive.
If "accepted" ("Goods acceptance attribute")
equals "true", the parameter may be missing,
without value, or with value. If "accepted"
("Goods acceptance attribute") = "false", the
parameter shall not be specified
*product_tax
decimal
-
VAT
amount
VAT amount is indicated in kopecks A value
cannot be negative, it shall be strictly less than
“product_cost” (“Unit price”), a length of
numerical value is from 0 to 17 digits, inclusive.
If transaction is not subject to VAT, “0” value
shall be specified.
If "accepted" ("Goods acceptance attribute")
equals "true", the parameter may be missing,
without value, or with value. If "accepted"
("Goods acceptance attribute") = "false", the
parameter shall not be specified
*accepted
boolean
+
Goods
acceptance
attribute
"true" – goods item is accepted, "false" - goods
item is not accepted. "accept_all” ("Accept all")
and "reject_all” ("Reject all") parameters cannot
be filled in at the same time

"cis" (“Transmitted IC / ICM”) parameter returns in the response if there are no "uit_code"
("Transferred IC / ICM") and "uitu_code" ("Transmitted SPIC") parameters in the body of
transmitted document in * .json format.
Example of the document body in the * .xml format:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<acceptance action_id="11" version="6">
    <shipment_id>57250cce-52cf-408b-99ef-39cc239f60fd</shipment_id>
    <trade_participant_inn_sender>0000000000</trade_participant_inn_sender>
    <trade_participant_inn_receiver>0000000000</trade_participant_inn_receive
r>
    <shipment_date>2019-11-18T21:00:00.000Z</shipment_date>
    <reception_date>2019-11-18T21:00:00.000Z</reception_date>
    <transfer_date>12.04.2019</transfer_date>
    <move_document_number>784378438</move_document_number>
    <move_document_date>12.04.2019</move_document_date>

## Page 174


174
    <turnover_type>SELLING</turnover_type>
    <products_list>
        <!--1 or more repetitions:-->
        <product>
            <ki>0000000000000000FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF</ki>
            <accept_type>true</accept_type>
        </product>
    </products_list>
</acceptance>
For correct processing of the “Acceptance” document in * . xml format in the current
implementation, all ICs shall coincide in the “Shipment” document with the ones specified in
“Acceptance” document. This way, if “Shipment” document specifies only the top level of ICs
without nested items, it is not possible to partially accept/reject ICs nested in the aggregates in the
“Acceptance” document in * . xml format.
4.1.7.2. Acceptance of shipment from EEU
Acceptance from EEU in response to the document “Shipment from EEU with IC
recognition” (EAS_CROSSBORDER):
This document can be created for the “Groceries”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Light industry”,
“Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Footwear”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and
smartphones”, “Vegetable oils”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”, “Packaged water”
and “New pneumatic rubber tires and tire casings” goods groups.
Both codes emitted in the Republic of Belarus, the Republic of Kazakhstan or in the Republic of
Armenia and codes emitted in the Russian Federation and previously exported to the Republic of
Belarus, the Republic of Kazakhstan or to the Republic of Armenia (re-import of goods to the
Russian Federation) can be transferred in the related document titled "4.2.1.1. Shipment from EEU
with IC recognition".
The codes transferred within re-import of the goods to the Russian Federation have “RETIRED”
status ("Withdrawn") in the TT GIS with "EAS_TRADE” disposal reason ("Cross-border export
to EEU countries"), owner of such codes in the shipping document is not verified in the TT GIS.
After acceptance, such codes change their status from "RETIRED" ("Withdrawn") (extended
status "WAIT_SHIPMENT" ("Awaiting acceptance of goods")) to "INTRODUCED" ("In
circulation"). Unaccepted codes remain in the TT GIS with "RETIRED” status ("Withdrawn")
without extended status.
The codes emitted in the EEU member states, when indicating in the shipping document, have a
status of "EMITTED" ("Emitted") or "APPLIED" ("Applied") (extended status -
"WAIT_SHIPMENT" ("Awaiting acceptance of goods")) in the national track and trace
information systems of the EEU member states. Accepted codes are stored in the TT GIS with
"INTRODUCED” status ("In circulation") without extended status. Unaccepted codes are not
stored in the TT GIS.
Acceptance from EEU in response to the “Shipment from EEU” document
(LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSSBORDER):


---

## Page 175


175
Creation of the document is available for the following goods groups: "Antiseptic/antibacterial
skin cleansers and hand sanitizers", “Groceries”, "Specialized food products and biologically
active food additives", "Bicycles and bicycle frames", "Veterinary medicines", "Perfume and Eau
de Toilette", "Games and toys for children", "Canned foods", "Pet foods", "Cosmetics, household
chemicals, and personal hygiene products", “Light industry”, "Medical devices", "Dairy products"
(cross-border trading), "Seafood", "Engine oils", "Footwear", “Radio-electronic products”,
“Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”, "Vegetable oils", "Confectionery
products", "Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages", "Building materials", "Packaged water",
"Photo cameras (except for cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs", "New pneumatic rubber
tires and tire casings".
To avoid errors, before submitting the document it is necessary to ensure that:
•
a valid license titled “Wholesale trade of medicines for veterinary use” is present in the
Rosselkhoznadzor registry — for the “Veterinary medicines” goods group;
•
the total weight/volume of the products specified in the document (including the products
nested into the aggregate) does not exceed the weight/volume specified in the AVD by more than:
o
2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group;
o
5 % — for the “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Dairy products” goods groups.

If the allowable deviation has been exceeded for the products with variable weight, indicate
in the document the weight that matches data in the AVD.

Description
LP_ACCEPT_GOODS

n
-
Reject all

document will be rejected, values specified in the
“products” will be ignored.
If a value is false, the “accepted” parameter will
be analyzed for each code in the document.

products"), this parameter will be ignored when
processing the document

An array may be empty, if “reject_all” = true. The
codes listed in the related shipment document are
specified. Requirements for codes:
•
must be unique in the document;
•
“goodTurnFlag” (“Indicator of goods
readiness to the circulation”) and
“goodMarkFlag” (“Indicator of readiness
to the marking”) = true in a goods card
in the NCMG;
•
a status is “APPLIED” (“Applied”) or
“INTRODUCED” (“In circulation”), an
extended status is “WAIT_SHIPMENT”
(“Awaiting acceptance of goods”) — for
all codes, except for the SPIC;
•
a status is not “DISAGGREGATION”
(“Disaggregated”) — for SPIC

*uitu_code
string
-
GPIC /
SPIC
It is mandatory if “uit_code” is not specified. A
code with a package type is specified:
“BOX” (“SPIC”) — for the “Vegetable oils” and
“Packaged water” goods groups when importing
from the Republic of Armenia under the mutual
recognition of the codes; the package can contain
no more than 5 nesting levels;
“GROUP” (“GPIC”) — only for the “Vegetable
oils” and “Packaged water” goods groups when
importing from the Republic of Armenia under
the mutual recognition of the codes.
Maximum quantity of the codes nested into the
GPIC / SPIC — 10,000
*accepted
boolea
n
-
Goods
acceptance
attribute
It is mandatory if “reject_all” = false or is missing
Possible values:
true — goods are accepted;
false — goods are not accepted
*tnved_code
string
-
EEU
FEACN
code (10
symbols)
It is mandatory if “accepted” = true; if not, it must
remain unfilled. It is specified only for IC / PIC.
 Both deprecated (valid until January 31, 2022)
and new EEU FEACN codes (valid from January
01, 2022) can be indicated for “Light industry”,
"Specialized food products and biologically active
food additives", "Dairy products", and "Photo
cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and
flash bulbs” goods groups
*vsd_number
string
-
AVD
identifier
Number of the first transport AVD. It is
mandatory if “veterinaryControl” (“Subject to
veterinary checks (supervision)”) = “true” in a
goods card in the NCMG; if “veterinaryControl”
= “false”, it must be missing. The parameter will
be ignored for the goods groups that do not have
the “veterinaryControl” attribute.

When FGIS VetIS is unavailable, the TT GIS
operates in a special mode, namely, without
verifying AVD identifier. Therefore, during the
period of FGIS VetIS unavailability, the
parameter can be filled in with both real AVD
identifier and zeros (value of 00000000-0000-
0000-0000-000000000000 or 0000-0000-0000-
0000-0000-0000-0000-0000), but only if at the
time of submission of the document there is no


---

## Page 181


181
Parameter
Type
Mandato
ry
Description
Comment
technical possibility to issue an electronic AVD in
the FGIS VetIS.

When FGIS VetIS is unavailable, an automatic
reprocessing of the document is started in the TT
GIS with a check of AVD identifier. Identifiers
consisting of zeros are not checked. A check
result can be found in the IC card in the
“Document operation type” field. If the check
fails or the document contains an identifier
consisting only of zeros, it is necessary to submit
“Correction of information on codes” document
(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE) with the
correct AVD identifier to the TT GIS. If AVD
identifier is not corrected, information about the
violation will be transmitted to the competent
state authorities for control (surveillance)
activities

Data on failed verification of the AVD identifier
in the ICs being part of the GPIC / SIC will be
displayed for the GPIC / SIC until all AVD
identifiers of the nested ICs are successfully
verified
*product_cost
integer
-
Price
The parameter can be omitted.
The price must be indicated in kopecks with VAT
(if the transaction is subject to VAT).
The value must not be negative and must be
strictly greater than “product_tax”.
The length of value: from 0 to 17 digits, inclusive.
Range: from 0 to 99999999999999999 inclusive
*product_tax
integer
-
VAT
amount
The parameter may be omitted if “accepted” =
true or “reject_all” = true.
It must not be provided if “accepted” = false.
The VAT amount must be indicated in kopecks:
from 0 to 17 digits, inclusive.
If transaction is not subject to VAT, “0” value
must be specified
*expiration_date
string
-

date

skin cleansers and hand sanitizers”, “Groceries”,
“Specialized food products and biologically
active food additives”, “Veterinary medicines”,
“Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Dairy products”
(when importing under the mutual recognition of
the codes), “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Vegetable

indicated for the IC, the weight for this IC will be
taken from the document, but if the weight has
been previously indicated, it will be overwritten
*import_data
object
-
Import data

**importer_id
string
-
INN (or
analog) of
the importer
It is mandatory if the “import_data” parameter is
filled in; if not, it must remain unfilled.
Length of value: from 1 to 50 characters,
inclusive
**importer_name
string
-
Importer
name
It is mandatory if the “import_data” parameter is
filled in; if not, it must remain unfilled.
Length of value: from 1 to 255 characters,
inclusive.
**declaration_number
string
-
Goods
declaration
registration
number
It is mandatory if the “import_data” parameter is
filled in; if not, it must remain unfilled.
Three groups separated by symbol “/”, where the
first group can contain 2, 5 or 8 symbols, the
second - 6 (goods declaration date), the third -7.
Example: 88888888/010422/7777777. The
second group of digits in the registration number
must match a value specified in
"declaration_date" parameter and must
correspond to a format of ddMMyy
**declaration_date
string
-
Date of
goods
declaration
It is mandatory if the “import_data” parameter is
filled in; if not, it must remain unfilled. It
corresponds to a value of the
“declaration_number” parameter. Format:
dd.MM.yyyy;
yyyy-MM-dd;
yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ;

confirming

Information can be specified either in the
“certificate_document_data” array in the
“certificate_type”, “certificate_number”,
“certificate_date” parameters, or outside of the
array in the parameters of the same name. It
cannot be simultaneously indicated inside and
outside of the “certificate_document_data” array.
All three parameters shall be filled in
simultaneously or all three shall be unfilled.
It shall not be filled in if “accepted” = false.
Information about permitting documents cannot
be specified for the aggregate of the “Cosmetics,
household chemicals, and personal hygiene
products” goods group.

is not specified for the codes in the marking system

“Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics,
household chemicals, and personal hygiene

4.1.7.3. Acceptance from EEU (volume and grade accounting)
The document can be created for the “Dairy products” goods group. Submission of information on
volume and grade indicators in the document takes place between an importer from the Russian
Federation and an exporter from the Republic of Belarus: number of the accepted goods and their
goods codes are specified in the document.
Acceptance from EEU (volume and grade accounting) is a data set in the document formed for
"4.2.1.3.
Shipment
from
EEU
(volume
and
grade
accounting)"
("EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT") document. ID of “4.2.1.3. Shipment from EEU
(volume and grade accounting)” ("EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT") document type is
specified in a value of “release_order_number” (“Number of shipping document”) parameter.
To avoid errors, before submitting the document it is necessary to ensure that the total weight or
volume of goods does not exceed a value in the AVD by more than 5 %. If the allowable deviation
has been exceeded for the products with variable weight, indicate in the document the weight that
matches data in the AVD.
Type of document:
Type
Description
EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE
Acceptance from EEU (volume and grade accounting).
JSON (MANUAL)


---

*gtin
string
+
Code of
the goods
A goods code corresponds to the one
specified in "Shipment from EEU (volume
and grade accounting)” document
(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT),
a card of which is received for a goods unit in
the NCMG (indication of the goods codes
received for other package types is
unavailable).
Length of value: 14 digits. Maximum number
of the goods codes in one document - 1,000.
A pair of values of “gtin” (“Goods code”) and
“vsd_number” (“AVD identifier”) parameters
shall be unique in the “products” ("Array of
transferred goods codes”) array. At the same
time, the same AVD number should not be
repeated for different goods codes
*cis_quantity
integer
+
Number of
transferred
ICs for this
goods code
It is specified when the goods are accepted
by document. Format: integer of no less than
0 and no more than a value specified in the
document titled “Shipment from EEU
(volume and grade accounting)”
(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT),
for given “gtin” (“Goods code”) . “0” value is
indicated if the goods have not been accepted
*group_quantity
integer
-
Number of
transferred
GPICs for
this goods
code
It is mandatory if “cis_quantity” (“Number of
transferred ICs for this goods code”) is not
specified. Format: integer of no less than 0
and no more than a value specified in the
document titled “Shipment from EEU
(volume and grade accounting)”

(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_IMPORT),
for given “gtin” (“Goods code”). “0” value is

*tnved_code
string
+
EEU
FEACN
code (10
symbols)
Both deprecated (valid until January 31, 2022)
and new EEU FEACN codes (valid from
January 01, 2022) can be indicated

*vsd_number
string
-
AVD
identifier
Number of the first transport AVD.
It is specified only for the “Dairy Products”
goods group.
The first transport AVD is formed by
manufacturer of the dairy products for their
further sales.
The parameter is mandatory if goods are
subject to veterinary checks
(“veterinaryControl” (“Subject to veterinary
checks (supervision)”) = “true” in a card in
the NCMG). The parameter shall be missing
for the non-controlled goods.
A pair of values of the “gtin” (“Goods code”)
and
“vsd_number”
(“AVD
identifier”)
parameters shall be unique in the “products”
array (“Array of transferred goods codes”). At
the same time, the same AVD number should
not be repeated for different goods codes.
Format:
minimum value — 36 characters, maximum
value
—
39
characters;
without
spaces;
[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-
9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12};
[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-
F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}-[A-F0-
9]{4}-[A-F0-9]{4}.
The TT GIS operates in a special mode when
FGIS VetIS is unavailable, namely, without
checking AVD identifier. Therefore, during
FGIS VetIS unavailability, the parameter can
be filled in with both real AVD identifier and
zeros (value of 00000000-0000-0000-0000-
000000000000 or 0000-0000-0000-0000-
0000-0000-0000-0000), but only if at the
time of submission of the document there is


---

## Page 197


197
Parameter
Type
Mandator
y
Descriptio
n
Comment
no technical possibility to issue an electronic
AVD in the FGIS VetIS.
When FGIS VetIS becomes available, an
automatic
repeated
processing
of
the
document is started in the TT GIS with a check
of AVD identifier. Identifiers consisting of
zeros are not checked. A check result can be
found in the IC card in the “Document
operation type” field. If the check fails or the
document contains an identifier consisting
only of zeros, it is necessary to submit
“Correction
of
information
on
codes”
document
(CIS_INFORMATION_CHANGE) with the
correct AVD identifier to the TT GIS. If AVD
identifier is not corrected, information about
the violation will be transmitted to authorized
government
authorities
for
control
(surveillance) measures
*product_cost
decima
l
-
Unit price
with VAT
The parameter is mandatory if a value of the
"reject_all" parameter ("Reject all") = “false”
or it is missing. A price of unit of goods (with
applied IC) with VAT shall be specified in
currency of the Operator, which accepts
information (if the transaction is subject to
VAT) only for units of goods and is not
applicable for aggregates. A value cannot be
negative, it shall be strictly greater than
“product_tax” (“VAT amount”), length of
numerical value is from 0 to 17 digits,
inclusive. Range of values: from 0 to
99999999999999999 inclusive
*product_tax
decima
l
-
VAT
amount
The parameter is mandatory if a value of the
"reject_all" parameter ("Reject all") = “false”
or it is missing. VAT amount is indicated in
kopecks only for units of goods. A value
cannot be negative, it is strictly less than
“product_cost” (“Unit price with VAT”), a
length of numerical value is from 0 to 17
digits, inclusive. If transaction is not subject to
VAT, “0” value shall be specified
*weight
integer
-
Total
weight of
products
The parameter shall be filled in for goods
with an attribute of variable weight (“Yes”
value is specified in the “Goods with variable
quantity” attribute in the goods card in the
NCMG). The parameter shall not be filled in
if other values are specified.

4.1.8. Withdrawal from circulation
The document can be created for the following goods groups: ‘Auto parts and components for
vehicles’, ‘Alcohol’, ‘Alternative tobacco products’, ‘Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and
hand sanitizers’, ‘Groceries’, ‘Non-alcoholic beer’, ‘Specialized food products and biologically
active food additives’, ‘Bicycles and bicycle frames’, ‘Veterinary medicines’, ‘Games and toys for
children’, ‘Perfume and Eau de Toilette’, ‘Cabling and wiring products’, ‘Canned foods’, ‘Pet
foods’, ‘Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal hygiene products’, ‘Light industry’,
‘Medical devices’, ‘Dairy products’, ‘Seafood’, ‘Engine oils’, ‘Meat products’, ‘Real fur’,
‘Nicotine products’, ‘Footwear’, ‘Optical fiber and fiber optic products’, ‘Heaters’, ‘Printed
goods’, ‘Pyrotechnics and fire-fighting equipment’, ‘Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages’,
‘Polymer pipes’, ‘Semi-finished and frozen food products’, ‘Radio-electronic products’, ‘Radio-
electronic products. Laptops and smartphones’, ‘Radio-electronic products. Electronic nicotine
delivery systems’, ‘Vegetable oils’, ‘Confectionery products’, ‘Juice products and non-alcoholic
beverages’, ‘Building materials’, ‘Tobacco products’, ‘Titanium metal products’, ‘Products made
of real fur’, ‘Home and kitchen goods’, ‘Packaged water’, ‘Fertilizers in consumer packaging’,
‘Photo cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs’, and ‘New pneumatic rubber
tires and tire casings’.
Submission of the document is available only in * .json format for the “Auto parts and components
for vehicles”, “Alcohol”, “Alternative tobacco products”, “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers
and hand sanitizers”, “Groceries”, “Specialized food products and biologically active food
additives”, “Veterinary medicines”, “Games and toys for children”,  “Cabling and wiring
products”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and personal hygiene
products”, “Medical devices”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Meat products”, “Real fur”, “Nicotine
products”, “Optical fiber and fiber optic products”, “Heaters”, “Printed goods”, “Pyrotechnics and
fire-fighting equipment”, “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages”, “Polymer pipes”, “Semi-
finished and frozen food products”, “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products.
Laptops and smartphones”, “Radio-electronic products. Electronic nicotine delivery systems”,
“Vegetable oils”, “Confectionery products”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”,


---

## Page 200


200
“Building materials”, “Tobacco products”, “Titanium metal products”, “Home and kitchen
goods”, “Fertilizers in consumer packaging” goods groups.
Submission of information on withdrawal of the ICs from circulation is available for the goods
groups for which there is no traceability of goods for all withdrawal reasons not only to a goods
owner in line with the marking system data, i.e. goods circulation participant’s INN in the
document may not coincide with the IC owner in line with the marking system data. Information
on withdrawal of IC/GPIC/SIC/SPIC, which do not belong to the document sender, can be
submitted. INN of the document sender is not compared with INN of the IC owner in the marking
system. Upon successful processing of the document, IC/GPIC/SIC/SPIC will remain on the
owner’s balance in line with marking system data and will change the status to “RETIRED”
(“Withdrawn”) with indication of the specified reason for withdrawal.
For the “Veterinary medicines” goods group, before withdrawing from circulation with the
“RETAIL” (“Retail sale”), “DISTANCE” (“Distance selling”), “VENDING” (“Sale through a
vending machine”), or “BY_SAMPLES” (“Sale by sample”) reasons, make sure that a valid retail
license is present in the Rosselkhoznadzor registry. If there is no license, this information will be
reported to the competent state authorities for control (surveillance) activities.
For the “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages” goods group:
Information about withdrawal from circulation with the “EAS_TRADE” (“Cross-border export to
EEU countries”) and “BEYOND_EEC_EXPORT” (“Export outside the EEU countries”) reasons
may be submitted only for codes that have the “MOVING_BY_UD” extended status (“Shipped”).
To assign this extended status, before withdrawal from circulation, you must first submit the
“4.1.15.
Notification
of
codes
status”
document
(CIS_NOTICE)
specifying
the
“SHIPPED_ABROAD” extended status (“Shipment for export is planned”).
If the “MOVING_BY_UD” status (“Shipped”) is not assigned, or is assigned by using the “UTD
(shipment of products)” document (FIXATION), the document of withdrawal from circulation
will fail with an error.
Specific features of withdrawal from circulation of the multi-product sets / multi-product SPICs:
•
the goods groups of all codes specified directly in the document must be the same. The
goods groups of their nested items may differ;
•
the disposal reason (including all restrictions on the “EAS_TRADE” reason (“Cross-border
export to EEU countries”)) must be available for all goods groups of the specified codes.
Otherwise, you will not be able to withdraw from circulation, and will have to disaggregate
the set / SPIC and withdraw from circulation each nested item individually;
•
attempting to withdraw from circulation a set / SPIC containing nested items subject to
stricter restrictions may result in an error. In such cases, the set / SPIC must be disaggre-
gated to withdraw the nested items. To prevent errors when creating a multi-product set /
SPIC, it is recommended to select the goods group with stricter restrictions as the primary
goods group.
Type of document:

 — “Goods transfer and acceptance
certificate” (indication is available
only in * .json format);
“OTHER” — “Other”;
“RECEIPT” — “Cash register
receipt”;
“SALES_RECEIPT” — “Sales
receipt”;
“UTD” — “Universal transfer
document”.
A type of primary document depends
on a value of the “action” parameter
(“Disposal reason”):
“BEYOND_EEC_EXPORT” =
“CUSTOMS_DECLARATION”,
“OTHER”;
“BY_SAMPLES”, “DISTANCE” =
“RECEIPT”, “SALES_RECEIPT”,
“OTHER”,
“CONSIGNMENT_NOTE”,
“UTD”;

“OTHER”;

“OTHER”;

“DIGITAL_CERTIFICATE”,
“ORTHOPEDIC_PRODUCT_ACT”
, “OTHER”;

“SALES_RECEIPT”, “OTHER”;
“VENDING”, “OWN_USE”,
“RETURN”, “LOSS”,
“UTILIZATION”, “RECALL”,
“PACKING”, “EXPIRATION”,
“OTHER”, “MEDICAL_USE”,
“MISMATCH”,
“VETERINARY_USE” = “OTHER”

4.1.9. Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation
The document can be created for all goods groups for which the “Withdrawal from circulation”
document (LK_RECEIPT, LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML) is available, except for the
“Auto parts and components for vehicles”, “Polymer pipes”, “Confectionery products” goods
groups.
This document is intended to cancel the “4.1.8. Withdrawal from circulation” document
(LK_RECEIPT, LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML) that has the “CHECKED_OK”
status (“Processed”).
Important
If several “4.1.8. Withdrawal from circulation” documents (LK_RECEIPT) with an attribute of
partial disposal (the “partial_quantity” (“Quantity of partially withdrawn units of consumption”) is
filled in) have been transferred for the same identification code, only the last recorded disposal
operation can be canceled
To process successfully the document:
•
a cancellation document sender’s INN must match with withdrawal document sender’s
INN;
•
the canceled document of withdrawal from circulation shall be the last document that has
influenced all marking codes from this document;
•
a sender of the cancellation document shall be an owner of all codes from the withdrawal
document (only for goods groups for which there is traceability of goods).
After successful processing of the document:
•
a withdrawal document will change its status to “CANCELED” (“Canceled”);
•
codes are returned to their initial status: SPIC will have the “Formed” status, other types
of the codes will have the “In circulation” status. If cancellation of withdrawal is made by
a document in which GPIC / SIC / SPIC are specified, GPIC / SIC / SPIC and all their
nested items will be returned to the initial status: If only nested items are specified in the
document of withdrawal, GPIC / SIC / SPIC of these nested items will not change their
status;
•
a quantity of the goods on the warehouse balance in the marking system will return to the
initial value.


---

4.1.10. Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)
Creation of the document is available for the “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand
sanitizers”, “Groceries”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and
personal hygiene products”, “Dairy products”, “Seafood”, “Vegetable oils”, “Juice products and
non-alcoholic beverages”, “Specialized food products and biologically active food additives”
goods groups.
Specific features of withdrawal from circulation of the multi-product sets:
•
the goods groups of all codes specified directly in the document must be the same. The
goods groups of their nested items may differ;
•
the codes (including nested items) can be specified in the document for the goods groups
for which submission of this document is available;
•
the disposal reason (including all restrictions on the “EAS_TRADE” reason (“Cross-border
export to EEU countries”)) must be available for all goods groups of the codes specified.
Otherwise, you will not be able to withdraw from circulation a multi-product set, you will
have to disaggregate the set and withdraw each nested item from circulation individually.
Type of document:
Type
Description
LK_GTIN_RECEIPT
Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting). JSON (MANUAL)
Example of document body in * .json format:
{
   "action":"DONATION",

*gtin_weight
integer
-
Weight in
grams
The total weight in grams by a goods
code specified in the “gtin” parameter. It
is mandatory for the “Dairy Products”
goods group if there is attribute of
variable weight (“Yes” value is specified
in the “Goods with variable quantity”
attribute in the goods card in the
NCMG).
If a goods item has an attribute of
variable weight, but the parameter is
missing — the document will be
processed with error.
For other goods groups, the parameter
will be ignored during processing.
Format:
•
digits only;
•
whole number without special
divider. If a value is in
milligrams, round up to grams
(whole number);
•
from 1 to 9 characters,
inclusive;
•
a value falls within the range of
1 to 999999999.
For a group package, an attribute of
variable weight is copied from the
nested items that are part of this
package.  If there is attribute of variable
weight, a weight equivalent to that of
one nested item is specified for a group
package.

Goods codes of nested items and weight,
which is specified in a document / goods
card (depending on the presence of the
attribute of variable weight), multiplied
by number of nested items, are
transferred to a virtual warehouse.
For the set, its nested goods are
analyzed:
•
if at least one goods item of the
set has an attribute of variable
weight, the parameter shall be
filled in with a value that is
equal to the total weight of all

4.1.11. Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)
Document creation is available for goods groups for which the “Withdrawal from circulation
(volume and grade accounting)” document is available.
The document is intended to submit information on cancellation of the "Withdrawal from
circulation (volume and grade accounting)" (LK_GTIN_RECEIPT) document processed
successfully in the TT GIS. If “Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade
accounting)” document (LK_GTIN_RECEIPT_CANCEL) has been processed successfully,
“Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)” document will change a status to
“Canceled” (CANCELED), quantity of the goods on the warehouse balance in the TT GIS will
return to the initial value.

The document can be created only for the ‘Products made of real fur’ goods group.
It is used for ICM that have the “APPLIED” status (“Applied”) when a goods circulation
participant does not need the IC / ICM and it is necessary to write them off in the marking system.

## Page 226

4.1.13. Write-off (general document)
Submission of the information is available for all goods groups, except “Groceries”, “Veterinary
medicines”, “Games and toys for children”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household
chemicals, and personal hygiene products”, “Optical fiber and fiber optic products”, “Radio-
electronic products”, “Vegetable oils”, “Titanium metal products”, “Products made of real fur”.
For the “Alternative tobacco products”, “Nicotine products” and “Tobacco products” goods groups
if goods are written off with the “EAS_TRADE” (“Cross-border export to EEU countries”) and
“BEYOND_EEC_EXPORT” (“Export outside the EEU countries”) reasons a license is checked
for compliance with the requirements. If such a license is missing, the document processing will
fail and codes will not be written off.
Specific features of the multi-product sets / multi-product SPICs:
•
attempting to write off a set / SPIC containing nested items subject to stricter restrictions
may result in an error. In such cases, the set / SPIC must be disaggregated to write off the
nested items. To prevent errors when creating a multi-product set / SPIC, it is recom-
mended to select the goods group with stricter restrictions as the primary goods group;
•
the write-off reason must be available for all goods groups of the codes specified;
•
the goods groups of all codes specified directly in the document must be the same. The
goods groups of their nested items may differ.
Type of document:
Type
Description
WRITE_OFF
Write-off (general document). JSON (MANUAL)
Example of document body in * .json format:
{
   "participantId":"7777777777",
   "dropoutReason":"OWN_USE_EXCISE",
   "withChild":false,
   "sntins":[
      "010461111111111121NNNNNNNNNNNNN",
      "010461111111111121KKKKKKKKKKKKK",
      "010461111111111121LLLLLLLLLLLLL"
   ],
   "sourceDocType":"OTHER",
   "sourceDocDate":"2022-02-22",
   "sourceDocNum":"123",
   "sourceDocName":"other source document"
}

4.1.14. Report on application of federal special stamps
Creation of the report is available for the “Alcohol” goods group.
A report on application of federal special stamps shall be submitted after federal special stamps
are actually applied to manufactured products in order to change a marking code status to
“INTRODUCED” (“In circulation”).
INN and KPP of the report sender are checked during the report processing for the absence of
blocking in EGAIS. A business place uniqueness is monitored as well: only one business place
can be registered for the same INN and KPP in the marking system.
Type of document:
Type
Description
ALCO_UTILISED
Report on application of federal special stamps. JSON (MANUAL)
Example of the document body:
{
   "participantInn":"7777777777",
   "participantKpp":"111111111",
   "gtin":"04688888888888",
   "productionDate":"1733821226",
   "expirationDate":"1734821226",
   "primaryDocumentNumber":"1111",
   "primaryDocumentDate":1733821226,
   "alcoholVolume":5.9,
   "emissionType":"LOCAL",
   "codes":[
"111111111111111111111NNNNN1NNNN1NN1NNNN11NNN1NNNENNN1NNN1NNNNNNNNNNNNNNN1N1N
EN1ENN1NNNN1NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNE1NNNNNNN1NNNNNNE1N1NNNNNNNNNN1EN1NNNNNNNNNN="
   ]
}

## Page 232

4.1.15. Notification of codes status
This document can only be created for the “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages” goods
group.
The document is intended to add and remove extended code statuses.
The following operations are supported:
•
assign the “LOST_INVENTORY” extended status (“Not found after inventory”) to the
codes that are recorded on the balance sheet in the marking system, but have not been found
during inventory;
•
assign the “MOVING_BY_UD” extended status (“Shipped”) to codes that are planned to
be exported outside the Russian Federation;
•
remove the “MOVING_BY_UD” extended status (“Shipped”) from codes that were
planned for export outside the Russian Federation.
Note
The “code” term is used below in a description of the document parameters to refer to identification codes
of all package types acceptable for indication in the document: IC, GPIC, PIC, SIC, SPIC.
For the multi-product sets and multi-product SPICs, the goods groups of all codes specified directly in the
document must be identical. Goods groups of their nested items may differ
Document type:
Type
Description
CIS_NOTICE
Notification of codes status. JSON (MANUAL)
Example of the document body:
{
   "participantInn":"1111111111",
   "actionDate":"2024-10-01",
   "action":"LOST_INVENTORY",
   "codes":[
      {
         "code":"010464444444444421KkKKkk"
      },
      {
         "code":"010464444444444421TtTTtt"
      }
   ]
}

4.1.17. Correction of information on codes
Note
The term “code” is used to define IC, ICM and PIC in a description of this document type
Creation of the document is available for the following goods groups: “Auto parts and components
for vehicles”, “Alternative tobacco products”, “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand
sanitizers”, “Groceries”, “Non-alcoholic beer”, “Specialized food products and biologically active
food additives”, “Bicycles and bicycle frames”, “Veterinary medicines”, “Perfume and Eau de


---

## Page 237


237
Toilette”, “Games and toys for children”, “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, “Cosmetics, household
chemicals, and personal hygiene products”, “Light industry”, “Medical devices”, “Dairy
products”, “Seafood”, “Engine oils”, “Meat products”, “Real fur”, “Nicotine products’,
“Footwear”, “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages”, “Pyrotechnics and fire-fighting
equipment”, “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”,
“Vegetable oils”, “Confectionery products”, “Juice products and non-alcoholic beverages”,
“Building materials”, “Tobacco products”, “Products made of real fur”, “Packaged water”, “Photo
cameras (except cine cameras), flash lights and flash bulbs”, “New pneumatic rubber tires and tire
casings”.
The document is used to amend previously submitted information on codes.
Changing information on codes is available to a goods circulation participant that has performed
their emission, application, or introduction into circulation, even if the participant is no longer their
owner.
To avoid errors, before submitting the document it is necessary to ensure that the total
weight/volume of the products specified in the document (including the products nested into the
aggregate) does not exceed the weight/volume specified in the AVD by more than:
•
2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group;
•
5 % — for the “Canned foods”, “Pet foods”, and “Dairy products” goods groups.
