## Page 859


859
Modifications introduced in the previous versions of the document
Note
This section contains records for the last six months from the last publication of the document. For earlier
records, see the “True API revision history archive” document

v.670.0 dated 27.05.2026
•
Creation of the “Introduction into circulation. With reason” document (LK_UNIVER-
SAL_INTRODUCE) is temporarily unavailable for the “Real fur” goods group. Addi-
tional information regarding the possibility of creating this document will be announced
later.
•
A note regarding automatic disaggregation of ACCs has been added to the description of
the “ACC Disaggregation” document (ATK_DISAGGREGATION).

v.669.0 dated 25.05.2026
The “Introduction into circulation. With reason” (LK_UNIVERSAL_INTRODUCE) document is
now available for the “Real fur” goods group.

v.668.0 dated 22.05.2026
•
Submission of the “Remarking” document (LK_REMARK) in * .json format using the
“Marking outside production or import” emission type (REAPPLY) is now available for
the “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and smartphones”
goods groups.
•
The “hashSum” parameter (“Hash sum of the cryptographic signature of the marking
code”) has been added to the “Shipment from EEU with IC recognition” document
(EAS_CROSSBORDER).
•
In the “Catalog “Disposal Reasons”” section, the availability of values has been updated
for the “Radio-electronic products”, “Radio-electronic products. Laptops and
smartphones” goods groups.

v.667.0 dated 21.05.2026
•
The “Acceptance of shipment from EEU” document (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) submitted
in response to the “Shipment from EEU” document (LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSS-
BORDER) to import goods from the Republic of Belarus is now available for the “Radio-
electronic products”  goods group.
•
Specifying the medical device model for marketing authorization is now available for the
“Medical devices” goods group. As a result:


---

## Page 860


860
– the “certificate_model” parameter (“Product model”) has been added to the follow-
ing documents:
•
“Acceptance of shipment from EEU” (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) submitted
in
response
to
the
“Shipment
from
EEU”
document
(LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSSBORDER);
•
“Shipment from EEU” (LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSSBORDER).
– the “model” response parameter (“Product model”) has been added to the “Method
of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list” method
(/cises/info).

v.666.0 dated 19.05.2026
The following features are available for the “Vegetable oils” goods group:
•
aggregation is now enabled for export to the Republic of Armenia under mutual recognition
of identification codes. As a result, in the “Shipment to EEU” document (EAS_CROSS-
BORDER_EXPORT), codes of the BOX (“SPIC”) and GROUP (“GPIC”) package types
can be specified in the “cis” parameter (“Transferred IC / GPIC / PIC / SPIC”);
•
aggregation is now enabled for import from the Republic of Armenia under mutual recog-
nition of identification codes. This means that GPIC and SPIC can now be specified in the
“Acceptance of shipment from EEU” document (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) submitted in re-
sponse to the “Shipment from EEU with IC recognition” document (EAS_CROSS-
BORDER). As a result, in the “Acceptance of shipment from EEU” document (LP_AC-
CEPT_GOODS), codes of the BOX (“SPIC”) and GROUP (“GPIC”) package types can
be specified in the “uitu_code” parameter (“Transferred identification code of the package
(aggregate)”).

v.665.0 dated 18.05.2026
The formula for calculating the sequential week number to determine the export period has been
updated in the following parameters:
•
“1023_IC_Period_Week_Single_gismt” (“Export period (week number)”) in the “Obtain-
ing information on wholesales and retail sales in terms of INN” export;
•
“1025_IC_Period_Week_Single_gismt” (“Export period (week number)”) in the “Obtain-
ing information on volume of retail sales in terms of INNs and addresses” export.

v.664.0 dated 15.05.2026


---

## Page 861


861
•
For the “Groceries” goods group:
– the “Withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade accounting)” (LK_GTIN_RE-
CEIPT) and “Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation (volume and grade ac-
counting)” (LK_GTIN_RECEIPT_CANCEL) documents are now available;
– a new disposal reason, “PACKING” (“Prepacking”), specified in the “action” pa-
rameter (“Disposal reason”), has been implemented in the “Withdrawal from Cir-
culation” document (LK_RECEIPT) of * .json format;
– the following values are now available in the “Catalog “Disposal Reasons”” sec-
tion: “BALANCE_CORRECTION” (“Correction of remaining items (volume and
grade accounting)”), “PACKING” (“Prepacking”), “STATE_SECRET” (“Sale in
deal with a state secret”).
•
For all goods groups supporting SPIC, creation of multi-product SPICs in the “Aggregation
of packaging” document (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) of * .json format and trans-
formation of multi-product SPICs in the “Transformation of packaging” document
(REAGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) are now available.

The following restrictions apply when creating and transforming multi-product SPICs:
– the document sender must be the owner of the nested codes if traceability is enabled
for them;
– all nested items must have either the “INTRODUCED” (“In circulation”) or
“Formed” status. The extended status must be either missing or “WAIT_TRANS-
FER_TO_OWNER” (“Awaiting transfer to owner”). Extended statuses may differ;
– at least one nested code must belong to the same goods group as the SPIC being
created / transformed;
– to avoid validation issues when submitting other documents containing a multi-
product SPICs, it is recommended to select the goods group with stricter restrictions
as the primary goods group;
– when creating a SPIC from tobacco goods groups, the primary goods group will be
“Tobacco products” (3 / tobacco). In this case, at least one nested code must belong
to that goods group;
– packages with “Tobacco products” (3 / tobacco) as the primary goods group  can-
not be transformed. However, a SPIC containing tobacco goods groups codes can
still be transformed if a different goods group is selected as the primary one.
•
The “unitSerialNumberType” parameter (“Aggregate code type”) and requirements for
multi-product SPICs have been added to the description of the “Aggregation of packaging
(“Alternative tobacco products”, “Nicotine products”, “Tobacco products”)” document
(AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT).


---

## Page 862


862
•
Requirements for multi-product SPICs have been added to the “Withdrawal from Circula-
tion” (LK_RECEIPT, LK_RECEIPT_CSV, LK_RECEIPT_XML), “Write-off (general
document)” (WRITE_OFF), and “Notification of codes status” (CIS_NOTICE) docu-
ments.
•
An optional response parameter, “splitSource” (“Split MC”), has been added to the follow-
ing methods: “Method for receiving publicly available brief information about ICs by list”
(/cises/list), “Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes
by list” (/cises/info), and “Method of receiving publicly available information on identifi-
cation codes by list (simplified set of attributes)” (/cises/short/list).

v.663.0 dated 14.05.2026
•
The following features have been implemented for the “Radio-electronic products. Lap-
tops and smartphones” goods group:
– the “Acceptance of shipment from EEU” document (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) sub-
mitted
in
response
to
the
“Shipment
from
EEU”
document
(LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSSBORDER) to import goods from the Republic of Bel-
arus;
– the process for submitting the information about shipment and acceptance with IC
recognition for transactions with the Republic of Belarus. As a result:
•
the “Shipment to EEU” (EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT) and “Ac-

v.647.0 dated 10.04.2026
•
For the “Dairy products” goods group:
– in the “4.1.2.1. Aggregation of packaging” document (AGGREGATION_DOCU-
MENT): when forming a “GROUP” group package (“GPIC”), the system validates
that the shipment number is identical for all nested items being added to the pack-
age;
– in the “4.1.17. Correction of information on codes” document (CIS_INFOR-
MATION_CHANGE): the following validations have been enabled when correct-
ing the “partNumber” parameter (“Shipment number”):
•
the code status is “APPLIED” (“Applied”);
•
the code is not part of the “GROUP” (“GPIC”) and “SET” (“SIC”);
•
the shipment number is found in the shipment register;
•
the INN of the correction document sender and the goods code match the
INN of the shipment owner and the goods code in the shipment register;
•
the extended status is either missing or is “WAIT_TRANS-
FER_TO_OWNER” (“Awaiting transferring to an owner”).

v.644.0 dated 03.04.2026
•
Submission of the “4.1.15. Notification of codes status” document (CIS_NOTICE) has
been disabled for the “Engine oils” goods group.
•
The ability to obtain information about goods cards with a full data set is now available for
the “Building materials” goods group. For this purpose, the “product-cards-construction”
value (“Report on goods cards — mandatory attributes (Building materials)”) was added
to the “reportId” parameter (“Identifier of the export type”) in the “8.3.12. Obtaining
information on goods cards” method (dispenser/tasks).
•
The following methods are now available for the “Cosmetics, household chemicals, and
personal hygiene products” goods group:
– “5.10. Method of obtaining the current balance in a warehouse” (/warehouse/bal-
ance);
– “5.11. Method of getting a list of operations in a warehouse” (/warehouse/opera-
tions).

v.643.0 dated 02.04.2026
•
The “4.1.4.6. Introduction into circulation. Remaining items” document (LP_INTRO-
DUCE_OST) is now available for the “Medical devices” goods group.
•
A new method to describe goods has been implemented for the “Radio-electronic prod-
ucts. Laptops and smartphones” goods group — creation of an industrial marking card (the
IM card). These cards can be created for any package type. The system automatically as-
signs a code with the 004 prefix to goods. The IM card lifecycle (attribute completion,
status changes) is identical to that of a regular goods card. All standard operations are
available for goods registered via an industrial marking card: introduction into circulation,
withdrawal from circulation, and others.

To create an IM card, the “is_sim” parameter (“Flag indicating whether an industrial mark-
ing card has been created”) must be specified in the “10.17. Method creating and updating
goods” method (/ nk/feed). If this parameter is specified, the following cannot be provided:
– “good_id” (“Goods item identifier”);


---

## Page 873


873
– “gtin” (“Goods code”);
– “is_tech_gtin” (“An attribute to create a goods card with technical goods code”);
– “is_kit” (“An attribute to create a bundle”).

If the request has been successfully processed, the generated goods code will be returned
in the response of the “10.18. Method for getting the feed status based on the feed ID from
its client” method (/nk/feed-status).

Limitations:
– subaccount configuration for ordering marking codes for codes with the 004 prefix
is not supported;
– industrial marking group packages and sets can include only codes with the 004
prefix;
– regular sets and group packages (with prefixes other than 004) cannot contain codes
with the 004 prefix;
– information about industrial marking cards cannot be obtained using the following
methods:
•
“10.9. Method for getting brief information on a product” (/nk/short-prod-
uct);
•
“10.16. Method for generating draft goods codes” (/nk/generate-gtins);
•
“10.15. Method for changing the image size and filling missing fields with
white color” (/nk/image).
•
The “is_sim” response parameter (“Industrial marking card flag”) has been added to the
“10.10. Method for getting a goods card, including the unpublished one” (/nk/feed-product)
and “10.8. Method for getting full information about a product” (/nk/product) methods.
•
A clarification stating that IM card details are unavailable in the method has been removed
from the description of the “10.14. Method for getting a list of all products that belong to
a specific owner” method (nk/etagslist).
•
Example requests to create a goods card with an industrial goods code for a unit of goods
and a set have been added to the description of the “10.17. Method creating and updating
goods” method (/nk/feed).
•
A clarification stating that IM card details are unavailable in the methods has been added
to the descriptions of the “10.16. Method for generating draft goods codes” (/nk/generate-
gtins) and “10.15. Method for changing the image size and filling missing fields with white
color” (/nk/image) methods.

For the “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers”, “Non-alcoholic

ment from EEU with IC recognition” (EAS_CROSSBORDER) (only for the

v.637.0 dated 25.03.2026
•
A new method to describe goods has been implemented for the “Radio-electronic prod-
ucts” goods group — creation of an industrial marking card (the IM card). IM cards can
be created for any package type. Registration in GS1 RUS is not required — the system
will automatically assign a code with the 004 prefix to goods. The IM card lifecycle (at-
tribute completion, status changes) is identical to that of a regular goods card. All standard
operations are available for goods registered via an industrial marking card: introduction
into circulation, withdrawal from circulation, and others.


---

## Page 877


877

To create an IM card, the “is_sim” request body parameter (“Flag indicating whether an
industrial marking card has been created”) has been added to the “Method creating and
updating goods” method (/nk/feed). If this parameter is specified, the following cannot be
provided:
– “good_id” (“Goods item identifier”);
– “gtin” (“Goods code”);
– “is_tech_gtin” (“An attribute to create a goods card with technical goods code”);
– “is_kit” (“Indicator that a goods card of the bundle has been created”).

If a request has been successfully processed, the assigned goods code will be returned in
the response of the “Method for getting the feed status based on the feed ID from its client”
method (/nk/feed-status).

Limitations:
– subaccount configuration for ordering marking codes for codes with the 004 prefix
is not supported;
– industrial marking group packages and industrial marking sets can include only
codes with the 004 prefix;
– regular sets and group packages (with prefixes other than 004) cannot contain codes
with the 004 prefix;
– information about industrial marking cards cannot be obtained using the following
methods:
•
“Method for getting brief information on a product” (/nk/short-product);
•
“Method for getting a list of all products that belong to a specific owner”
(/nk/etagslist).
•
The “is_sim” parameter (“Flag indicating whether the goods card has an industrial goods
code (prefix 004)”) has been added to the “Additional parameters for GG “Radio-electronic
products”” section.

v.636.0 dated 24.03.2026
•
The method to obtain a catalog of categories, types, and results of deviations related to
circulation of goods subject to mandatory marking has been implemented — “8.3.15.2.
Method to obtain a catalog of deviation categories and types” (/api/v3/true-api/direc-
tory/statistics).
•
The “Obtaining information on deviations” export (“VIOLATIONS”) has been renamed
“8.3.15.1. Export of information on deviations”.

v.635.0 dated 23.03.2026
Transformation of the set via the “4.1.2.2. Transformation of packaging” document
(REAGGREGATION_DOCUMENT) is no longer available for the “Radio-electronic products.
Electronic nicotine delivery systems” goods group.

v.634.0 dated 20.03.2026
•
Under mutual recognition of identification codes, export of aggregates to the Republic of
Armenia is now available for the “Packaged water” goods group. This means that now
you can indicate GPICs and SPICs in the “4.1.6.2. Shipment to EEU” document
(EAS_CROSSBORDER_EXPORT).

Accordingly, in the “4.1.6.2. Shipment to EEU” document (EAS_CROSSBORDER_EX-
PORT):
– the comment of the “products” parameter (“Array containing the list of transferred
codes”) has been updated as follows: the maximum number of codes in the docu-
ment (including nested items) - 100,000;
– ICs with the BOX (“SPIC”) and GROUP (“GPIC”) package types may be specified
in the “cis” parameter (“Transferred IC / GPIC / PIC / SPIC”);
– requirements for filling in the “production_date” (“Production date”) and “expira-
tion_date” (“Expiration date”) parameters have been updated.
•
For the “Packaged water” goods group, the Operator of the Republic of Armenia can now
indicate GPICs and SPICs in the “4.2.2.1. Acceptance in EEU” document (EAS_CROSS-
BORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE).

Accordingly, in the “4.2.2.1. Acceptance in EEU” document (EAS_CROSS-
BORDER_EXPORT_ACCEPTANCE):
– the following parameters have been added: “cis_type” (“Marking code type”) of
string type, and “children” (“Array containing the list of nested codes”) of array of
objects type;
– requirements for filling in the “cis” parameter (“Transferred IC / GPIC / PIC /
SPIC”) have been updated;


---

## Page 879


879
– comments to the “product_cost” (“Price”) and “product_tax” (“VAT amount”) pa-
rameters have been updated.

v.631.0 dated 16.03.2026
•
The ability to obtain information about goods cards with a full data set is now available for

For the “Confectionery products” and “Real fur” goods groups:
– in the “4.1.4.1. Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing in the Russian Federa-
tion” (LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS), “4.1.4.7. Introduction into circulation. Con-
tract manufacturing” (LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING), and “4.1.4.4. Intro-
duction into circulation. Cross-border trading” (CROSSBORDER) documents:
•
indication of the permitting document details is now mandatory if:
-
no permitting document details are specified for the codes in the mark-
ing system, AND
-
the “reasonCertMissingDetails” (“Requirements of confirmation of
conformity are missing; grounds”) is unfilled for these codes in a goods
card in the NCMG;
•
permitting document details cannot be specified for any package type if they
differ from those specified in a goods card of units of goods (including those
nested into the aggregate) in the NCMG;
•
the permitting document status must be valid.
– in the “4.1.4.8 Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS” document
(LP_FTS_INTRODUCE):
•
the system verifies that permitting document details are present in the cus-
toms declaration for codes of units of goods and bundles (including those
nested into the aggregate);
•
validation has been added to ensure that permitting document details spec-
ified in the customs declaration or in the marking system for ICs of units of
goods or bundles (including those nested into the aggregate) match the data
specified in a goods card in the NCMG;

the permitting document status must be valid.

v.601.0 dated 30.12.2025
•
The ability to submit the “4.1.2.4. Creating set” document (SETS_AGGREGATION) has
been disabled for the “Radio-electronic products” goods group.

•
In the description of the “5.10. Method of obtaining the current balance in a warehouse”
method (/warehouse/balance):
–
the following clarifications have been added:


---

## Page 896


896
•
outbound transactions (under sales receipts with item-by-item indication of
marking codes) and inbound transactions (under return receipts / return re-
ceipts (correction) are reflected on the warehouse balance, provided the re-
ceipt does not contain the HoReCa attribute in its details. For receipts spec-
ifying a goods code (GTIN) and quantity, such transactions are recorded
only if neither the vending nor the HoReCa attribute is present;
•
outbound / inbound transactions on the warehouse balance under sales re-
ceipts / return receipts / return receipts (correction) that include an agent
commission scheme attribute and a goods code (GTIN), as well as quantity
will be reflected on the supplier’s balance (not the actual seller’s balance)
if no movement of identification codes to the actual seller has been regis-
tered prior to the sale.
–
the following document type affecting the balance has been added to the comment
of the “netWeight” response parameter (“Total weight of goods on the balance as
of the current date, in grams”): “RECEIPT_CORRECTION_FOR_RETURN”
(“Correction receipt for return receipt (including small wholesale)”).
•
In the description of the “5.11. Method of getting a list of operations in a warehouse”
method (/warehouse/operations), the following document type affecting the balance has
been added to comments of the “docType” (“Document type”) and “netWeight” (“Weight
of transferred goods”) response parameters: “RECEIPT_CORRECTION_FOR_RE-
TURN” (“Correction receipt for return receipt (including small wholesale)”).

For the “Engine oils” goods group:
– a new withdrawal reason — “VENDING” (“Sale through a vending machine”)
specified in the “action” parameter (“Withdrawal reason”) has been implemented
in the “4.1.8. Withdrawal from circulation” document (LK_RECEIPT) of * .json
format.

The mandatory status of other document parameters and the requirements for filling
in these parameters depend on the withdrawal reason. For more details, see “4.1.8.
Withdrawal from circulation” (LK_RECEIPT) document description;
– the availability of the “VENDING” value (“Sale through a vending machine”) has
been updated in the “Catalog – Disposal Reasons” section.
•
For the “Non-alcoholic beer” goods group, the partial withdrawal is available when sub-
mitting the “4.1.8. Withdrawal from circulation” document (LK_RECEIPT) in * .json for-
mat. For enable this, the “partial_quantity” parameter (“Quantity of partially withdrawn
units of consumption”) must be specified and the withdrawal reason must be one of the
following:
– “CONFISCATION” (“Confiscation”);
– “DESTRUCTION” (“Destruction”);
– “EXPIRATION” (“Expiration date”);
– “LOSS” (“Loss”);
– “OTHER” (“Other”);
– “UTILIZATION” (“Disposal”).

Submission of the “4.1.9. Cancellation of withdrawal from circulation” document
(LK_RECEIPT_CANCEL) submitted in response to the “4.1.8. Withdrawal from

“hsManufacturer” (“Economic entity-manufacturer”);
•
“companyManufacturer” (“Manufacturing company”).

v.588.0 dated 02.12.2025
•
The “vsd_number” parameter (“AVD identifier”) has been added for the “Meat products”
goods group to the description of the following documents:
– “4.1.4.1. Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing in the Russian Federation”
(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS);
– “4.1.4.3. Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing outside of EEU”
(LP_GOODS_IMPORT);
– “4.1.4.7. Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing” (LK_CON-
TRACT_COMMISSIONING);
– “4.1.4.4. Introduction into circulation. Cross-border trading” (CROSSBORDER).
•
For the “Canned foods” goods group, mandatory validation of the total weight of the prod-
ucts (including those nested into the aggregate) has been implemented in the following
documents:
– “4.1.4.1. Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing in the Russian Federation”
(LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS);
– “4.1.4.7. Introduction into circulation. Contract manufacturing” (LK_CON-
TRACT_COMMISSIONING);
– “4.1.4.3. Introduction into circulation. Manufacturing outside of EEU”
(LP_GOODS_IMPORT);
– “4.1.4.4. Introduction into circulation. Cross-border trading” (CROSSBORDER);
– “4.1.4.8 Introduction into circulation. Import with FCS” (LP_FTS_INTRODUCE);
– “4.1.7.2. Acceptance of shipment from EEU” (LP_ACCEPT_GOODS) submitted
in response to the “4.2.1.2. Shipment from EEU” (LP_SHIP_GOODS_CROSS-
BORDER) and “4.2.1.1. Shipment from EEU with IC recognition” (EAS_CROSS-
BORDER) documents;
– “4.1.17. Correction of information on codes”.


---

## Page 902


902

The total weight of the products must not exceed the weight specified in the AVD by more
than 5 %.
•
A clarification has been added to the description of the above-mentioned documents, as
well as to the description of the “4.1.7.3. Acceptance from EEU (volume and grade ac-
counting)”
document
type
(EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE,
EAS_GTIN_CROSSBORDER_ACCEPTANCE_CSV), stating that the total weight/vol-
ume of the products specified in the document (including the products nested into the ag-
gregate) must not exceed the weight/volume specified in the AVD by more than:
– 2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group;
– 5 % — for the “Pet foods” and “Dairy products” goods groups.
•
In the description of the “4.1.17. Correction of information on codes” document (CIS_IN-
FORMATION_CHANGE), a clarification has been removed from the comment for the
“weight” parameter (“Actual weight of goods in grams”). The clarification stated that the
weight value for the units of goods (including those nested into the aggregate) must not
exceed a value specified in the AVD by more than: 2 % — for the “Seafood” goods group,
5 % — for the “Pet foods” and “Dairy products” goods groups.
•
Information about allowed emission types for the set and nested items has been updated in
the description of the “4.1.2.4. Creating set” document type (SETS_AGGREGATION,
SETS_AGGREGATION_XML).

v.587.0 dated 01.12.2025
•
The experiment on marking of home and kitchen goods (FEACN codes subject to marking
are specified in the Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation No. 1458 dated
September 20, 2025) and fertilizers (FEACN codes subject to marking are specified in the
Decree of the Government of the Russian Federation No. 1621 dated October 21, 2025)
has been launched. At this stage, the following capabilities are available for the “Home
and kitchen goods”, “Fertilizers in consumer packaging” goods groups:
– GCP registration;
– description of goods via API of the NCMG;
– ordering of marking codes via API of the OMS;
– submission of the information on application of marking codes to goods via the
OMS API;
– submission of the following documents:
•
“4.1.13. Write-off (general document)” (WRITE_OFF);
•
“4.1.2.1. Aggregation of packaging” (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT);

ume and grade accounting)”) has been disabled for the “Seafood” goods group in the

For the “Beer, beer-based and low-alcohol beverages” goods group, IC status verification
(when “EAS_TRADE” (“Cross-border export to EEU countries”) and “BE-
YOND_EEC_EXPORT” (“Export outside the EEU countries”) disposal reasons are spec-
ified) has been enabled on the production environment in the “4.1.8. Withdrawal from cir-
culation” document (LK_RECEIPT): the IC must have the “Shipped” status.

For all goods groups that support sets, an identification code with the “SET” packaging
type (“Set (SIC)”) can be specified in the “4.1.3.1. ACC aggregation” (ATK_AGGREGA-

“4.1.3.2.

transformation”

v.583.0 dated 21.11.2025
•
A clarification has been added to the description of the “Aggregation” document type (AG-
GREGATION_DOCUMENT, AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT_XML) and the “Aggre-
gation (“Alternative tobacco products”, “Nicotine products”, “Tobacco products”)” docu-
ment (AGGREGATION_DOCUMENT), stating that the SPIC must be unique in the mark-
ing system, regardless of INN, goods group, or status.
•
In the description of the “Write-off (general document)” document (WRITE_OFF), the
following clarification has been added to the comment of the “withChild” parameter (“In-
dicator that all nested items are written off”): the “false” value (“Write off an aggregate
only”) is available only for the “Alternative tobacco products”, “Nicotine products”, and
“Tobacco products” goods groups.
•
The following parameters have been added to the section “Additional parameters for GG
“Auto parts and components for vehicles””:
– “basicElectrodeMaterial” (“Base material for electrode”);
– “wheelDiskType” (“Rim type”);
– “diskMaterial” (“Rim material”);
– “fixationHoleQuantity” (“Number of lug holes”);
– “nominalDiskDiameter” (“Nominal rim diameter, mm / inches”);
– “nominalDiskWidth” (“Nominal rim width, mm / inches”);
– “centerBoreDiameter” (“Diameter of center bore, mm”);
– “holeLocationDiameter” (“Pitch circle diameter, mm”).

v.582.0 dated 20.11.2025
•
The “4.1.17. Correction of information on codes” document (CIS_INFOR-
MATION_CHANGE) is available for the “Building materials” goods group.
•
An optional response parameter - “isControllability” (“Indicator that there are controlled
facilities according to FGIS VetIS data”) has been added to the “3.1. Method of checking
the goods circulation participant registration by INN in TT GIS” method (/participants).

907

In the description of the “4.1.2.2. Transformation of packaging” document (REAGGRE-
GATION_DOCUMENT):

The “pastaType” (“Type of pasta products”) and “rawOriginOther” (“Raw products origin (if it is

“Groceries”” catalog.

The “4.1.2.2. Transformation of packaging” document (REAGGREGATION_DOCUMENT)
cannot be used for multi-product sets.

ipant”) and “fias_id” (“FIAS identifier”) parameters has been added to the “4.1.8. Withdrawal
from circulation” document (LK_RECEIPT) for the “Veterinary medicines” goods group.

v.578.0 dated 12.11.2025
•
A response example for error code 403 has been added to the description of the “5.1.3.
Method of receiving publicly available information on identification codes by list (simpli-
fied set of attributes)” (/cises/short/list) .
•
A note has been added to the “paymentGroup” parameter (“Payment group based on
FEACN code”) in the “Catalog - Additional parameters in the response, depending on the
goods groups” section, clarifying that the value corresponds to a stage of introduc-tion of
mandatory marking in accordance with the Decree of the Government of the Russian Fed-
eration.

## Page 908


908

v.577.0 dated 11.11.2025
•
The ability to submit the “4.1.12. Write-off” document (LK_KM_CANCELLATION) has
been disabled for all goods groups except “Products made of real fur”.
•
For the “Packaged water” goods group, in the “4.1.4.1. Introduction into circulation. Man-
ufacturing in the Russian Federation” (LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS, LP_INTRO-
DUCE_GOODS_CSV, LP_INTRODUCE_GOODS_XML) and “4.1.4.7. Introduction
into circulation. Contract manufacturing” (LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING,
LK_CONTRACT_COMMISSIONING_XML) document types:
– the “well_number” parameter (“Water well number”) in the “certificate_docu-
ment_data” array (“Array of information on the permitting documents”) is now
mandatory for identification codes of the units of goods (including for codes nested
into an aggregate), if the “groundwaterUtilization” (“Is not obtained from under-
ground sources”) is unfilled in a goods card in the NCMG;
– the “licences” array (“Array of subsoil licenses”), containing the “licence_number”
(“Number of subsoil license”) and “licence_date” (“License issue date”) parame-
ters, is now mandatory if the “groundwaterUtilization” (“Is not obtained from un-
derground sources”) is unfilled in a goods card in the NCMG, regardless of OKPD
2 code specified in the goods card. Furthmore, if an aggregate is specified in the
documents, the system checks the “groundwaterUtilization” attribute for the goods
that are nested into this aggregate. If “groundwaterUtilization” = “Yes”, license
information is not required.
•
The ability to obtain information about goods cards with a full data set is available for the
“Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers” and “Medical devices”
goods groups. For this purpose, in the “8.3.12. Obtaining information on goods cards”
method (dispenser/tasks) the following values have been added for the “reportId” parame-
ter (“Export type ID”):
– “product-cards-antiseptic” (“Report on goods cards – mandatory attributes (Anti-
septics)”);
– “product-cards-wheelchairs” (“Report on goods cards – mandatory attributes (Med-
ical devices)”);
– “product-cards-wheelchairs-actual” (“Report on goods cards – mandatory attrib-
utes (Wheelchairs)”).
•
In the “8.2. Availability of exports of the report type according to the goods groups” sec-
tion, the “Antiseptic/antibacterial skin cleansers and hand sanitizers” and “Medical de-
vices” goods groups have been added to a list of the goods groups for which the export of
information about goods cards with a full data set is available.
•
The deprecated response parameter - “cisWithoutBrackets” (“IC without brackets”) has
been removed from the “5.1.2. Method of receiving publicly available information on

(/cises/list) methods.
•
Availability of values has been updated in the section titled “Catalog – Disposal Reasons”.
